heading: Skills & Tools
subtitle: Equipped with essential skills and tools to adapt, create, and deliver across diverse projects.

groups.title: Languages

items.name: Python
items.description: Python enthusiast with a focus on problem-solving and automation. Adept at integrating APIs, managing data, and creating efficient scripts for real-world tasks.

items.description: Hands-on experience developing programs in C, emphasizing optimization, modular design, and debugging. Strong grasp of procedural programming and compiler behavior.

items.name: C++
